entries.title: Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
Bug fix verification: audit fire-and-forget async pattern — test strategy
Design agents write to main repo paths when researcher artifacts show main-repo working directory
Bug fix verification: tokio runtime nesting panic in async tool handler
